name: Yext, Inc.
business: Yext sells a digital presence platform (Answers Platform) that lets businesses structure and organize information in a Knowledge Graph and deliver it across first- and third-party websites and applications via a Publisher Network of over 200 service and application providers. Its platform powers key products including Listings, Reviews, Pages, Search, Social, Relate, and Scout. It serves businesses of nearly all sizes in diverse industries such as healthcare, hospitality, food services, retail, and financial services.

exposures.sentence: The digital consumer journey continues to change with the expansion of artificial intelligence ( AI ) and large language models.

catalysts.event: Commencement of self-tender offer to repurchase up to $180 million of common stock
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2026, we commenced an issuer self-tender offer (the Tender Offer ) to purchase for cash up to $180.0 million in value of shares of our common stock at a price of not less than $5.75 nor greater than $6.50 per share, upon the terms and subject to the conditions described in the offer to purchase and the related letter of transmittal filed with the SEC on February 10, 2026, as each may be amended time to time.

catalysts.event: Borrowing of additional $50 million under Delayed Draw Term Loan Facility for the self-tender offer
catalysts.sentence: On March 6, 2026, we borrowed an additional $50.0 million, which we intend to use in connection with the Tender Offer.
